mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{ownerUserNo} AND USER_ROLE = 'OWNER'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORES ( STORE_ID, STORE_CODE, STORE_NAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, OWNER_USER_No, STATUS, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, 'S' || #{storeId}, #{storeName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{ownerUserNo}, 'OPEN', 1, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS Phone, ADDRESS AS Address, STATUS AS Status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY STORE_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND CREATED_AT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CREATED_AT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR STORE_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo, STATUS AS status FROM STORES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STORES SET STORE_NAME = #{storeName}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, STORE_CODE AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo, STATUS AS status FROM STORES WHERE OWNER_USER_NO = #{ownerUserNo}
